description: Taxonomy for classifying bone-vs-world contact during interaction animations. Used by tools/interaction_pipeline/detectors.py to separate profile-tuning issues from engine bugs.

classes.free: Bone is not touching any voxel. Positive signed_distance.
classes.desired_contact: Bone is touching a voxel marked as the interaction surface (seat, handle, step). Small positive penetration (signed_distance in [-0.05, 0]) is expected.
classes.inside_asset: Bone penetrates a non-interaction voxel of the target asset. Always a violation.
classes.inside_world: Bone penetrates a world voxel that is not part of the target asset. Always a violation.
